name: KS_NAKIT_AKIS_KUMULATIF_BURAK
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[KS_NAKIT_AKIS_KUMULATIF_BURAK] AS

-- Query for Firm 123
SELECT  
    '123' AS FIRMNR,
    CLCARD.CODE, 
    CLCARD.DEFINITION_,
    BNFICHE.FICHENO FICHENO,
    BNFICHE.DATE_ DATE_,
    BNFLINE.LINEEXP,
    EMFICHE.FICHENO MUH_FICHENO,
    EMFICHE.DATE_ MUH_DATE_,
    CASE 
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '120.07%' THEN 'Mağaza Para' 
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '335.01%' THEN 'Personel'  
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '336.%' THEN 'Personel'  
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '195.%' THEN 'Personel'  
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '196.%' THEN 'Personel'  
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '108.01%' THEN 'KKartı'    
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '329.%' THEN 'Şirket KKartı'    
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '108.02%' THEN 'HGS' 
        ELSE  
            CASE BNFLINE.TRCODE 
                WHEN 1 THEN 'Banka İşlem' 
                WHEN 3 THEN 'Cari' 
                WHEN 4 THEN 'Cari' 
                WHEN 6 THEN 'Kur Farkı' 
                ELSE
                    CASE BNFLINE.MODULENR 
                        WHEN 7 THEN 'Virman'  
                        WHEN 6 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                        WHEN 61 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                        WHEN 62 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                        WHEN 63 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                        WHEN 64 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                        WHEN 65 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                    END
            END
    END AS TYPE,
    CASE BNFLINE.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN 'Ödemeler' WHEN 0 THEN 'Tahsilat' END AS SIGN,
    BNFLINE.TRCODE,
    (CASE BNFLINE.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT * (-1) WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT END) AS TOTAL,
    DATEPART(wk, BNFLINE.DATE_) HAFTA,
    BNFLINE.DATE_ AS BAS_TAR,
    BNFLINE.DATE_ AS BIT_TAR
FROM dbo.LG_123_01_BNFLINE AS BNFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_123_01_BNFICHE AS BNFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) 
    ON BNFLINE.SOURCEFREF = BNFICHE.LOGICALREF AND BNFLINE.MODULENR = BNFICHE.MODULENR
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_123_CLCARD AS CLCARD WITH (NOLOCK) 
    ON BNFLINE.CLIENTREF = CLCARD.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_123_01_EMFICHE AS EMFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) 
    ON BNFLINE.ACCFICHEREF = EMFICHE.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.L_CURRENCYLIST AS L_CURRENCYLIST WITH (NOLOCK) 
    ON L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE = BNFLINE.TRCURR AND L_CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = '123'
WHERE (YEAR(BNFLINE.DATE_) = 2024) AND BNFLINE.TRCODE NOT IN (2)

UNION ALL

-- Query for Firm 223
SELECT  
    '223' AS FIRMNR,
    CLCARD.CODE, 
    CLCARD.DEFINITION_,
    BNFICHE.FICHENO FICHENO,
    BNFICHE.DATE_ DATE_,
    BNFLINE.LINEEXP,
    EMFICHE.FICHENO MUH_FICHENO,
    EMFICHE.DATE_ MUH_DATE_,
    CASE 
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '120.07%' THEN 'Mağaza Para' 
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '335.01%' THEN 'Personel'  
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '336.%' THEN 'Personel'  
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '195.%' THEN 'Personel'  
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '196.%' THEN 'Personel'  
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '108.01%' THEN 'KKartı'    
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '329.%' THEN 'Şirket KKartı'    
        WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '108.02%' THEN 'HGS' 
        ELSE  
            CASE BNFLINE.TRCODE 
                WHEN 1 THEN 'Banka İşlem' 
                WHEN 3 THEN 'Cari' 
                WHEN 4 THEN 'Cari' 
                WHEN 6 THEN 'Kur Farkı' 
                ELSE
                    CASE BNFLINE.MODULENR 
                        WHEN 7 THEN 'Virman'  
                        WHEN 6 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                        WHEN 61 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                        WHEN 62 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                        WHEN 63 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                        WHEN 64 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                        WHEN 65 THEN 'Çek/Senet' 
                    END
            END
    END AS TYPE,
    CASE BNFLINE.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN 'Ödemeler' WHEN 0 THEN 'Tahsilat' END AS SIGN,
    BNFLINE.TRCODE,
    (CASE BNFLINE.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT * (-1) WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT END) AS TOTAL,
    DATEPART(wk, BNFLINE.DATE_) HAFTA,
    BNFLINE.DATE_ AS BAS_TAR,
    BNFLINE.DATE_ AS BIT_TAR
FROM dbo.LG_223_01_BNFLINE AS BNFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_223_01_BNFICHE AS BNFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) 
    ON BNFLINE.SOURCEFREF = BNFICHE.LOGICALREF AND BNFLINE.MODULENR = BNFICHE.MODULENR
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_223_CLCARD AS CLCARD WITH (NOLOCK) 
    ON BNFLINE.CLIENTREF = CLCARD.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_223_01_EMFICHE AS EMFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) 
    ON BNFLINE.ACCFICHEREF = EMFICHE.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.L_CURRENCYLIST AS L_CURRENCYLIST WITH (NOLOCK) 
    ON L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE = BNFLINE.TRCURR AND L_CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = '223'
WHERE (YEAR(BNFLINE.DATE_) = 2024) AND BNFLINE.TRCODE NOT IN (2)

UNION ALL

-- Bank Account Opening Balances for Firm 123
SELECT 
    '123' AS FIRMNR,
    BANKACC.CODE, 
    BANKACC.DEFINITION_,
    '' AS FICHENO,
    CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE()) AS DATE_,
    BNFLINE.LINEEXP,
    '' AS MUH_FICHENO,
    CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE()) AS MUH_DATE_,
    'Banka' AS TYPE,
    'Açılış Bakiye' AS SIGN,
    7 AS TRCODE,
    (SUM((CASE BNFLINE.SIGN 
        WHEN 1 THEN ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END), 2) * (-1) 
        ELSE ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END), 2) 
    END))) * MAX(ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1, 1)) AS TOTAL,
    DATEPART(wk, GETDATE()) AS HAFTA,
    MIN(GETDATE()) AS BAS_TAR,
    MAX(GETDATE()) AS BIT_TAR
FROM dbo.LG_123_01_BNFLINE AS BNFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_123_BNCARD AS BNCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BANKREF = BNCARD.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_123_BANKACC AS BANKACC WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BNACCREF = BANKACC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_123_01_BNFICHE AS BNFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.SOURCEFREF = BNFICHE.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.L_CURRENCYLIST AS L_CURRENCYLIST WITH (NOLOCK) 
    ON L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE = BNFLINE.TRCURR AND L_CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = '123'
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) 
    ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE())
WHERE BNFLINE.CANCELLED = 0 AND BANKACC.CARDTYPE IN (1,3)
GROUP BY BANKACC.CODE, BNFLINE.LINEEXP, BANKACC.DEFINITION_, BANKACC.LOGICALREF, BNCARD.LOGICALREF, 
         BNFLINE.TRCURR, L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE

UNION ALL

-- Bank Account Opening Balances for Firm 223
SELECT 
    '223' AS FIRMNR,
    BANKACC.CODE, 
    BANKACC.DEFINITION_,
    '' AS FICHENO,
    CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE()) AS DATE_,
    BNFLINE.LINEEXP,
    '' AS MUH_FICHENO,
    CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE()) AS MUH_DATE_,
    'Banka' AS TYPE,
    'Açılış Bakiye' AS SIGN,
    7 AS TRCODE,
    (SUM((CASE BNFLINE.SIGN 
        WHEN 1 THEN ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END), 2) * (-1) 
        ELSE ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END), 2) 
    END))) * MAX(ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1, 1)) AS TOTAL,
    DATEPART(wk, GETDATE()) AS HAFTA,
    MIN(GETDATE()) AS BAS_TAR,
    MAX(GETDATE()) AS BIT_TAR
FROM dbo.LG_223_01_BNFLINE AS BNFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_223_BNCARD AS BNCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BANKREF = BNCARD.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_223_BANKACC AS BANKACC WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BNACCREF = BANKACC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_223_01_BNFICHE AS BNFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.SOURCEFREF = BNFICHE.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.L_CURRENCYLIST AS L_CURRENCYLIST WITH (NOLOCK) 
    ON L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE = BNFLINE.TRCURR AND L_CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = '223'
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_223 AS EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) 
    ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE())
WHERE BNFLINE.CANCELLED = 0 AND BANKACC.CARDTYPE IN (1,3)
GROUP BY BANKACC.CODE, BNFLINE.LINEEXP, BANKACC.DEFINITION_, BANKACC.LOGICALREF, BNCARD.LOGICALREF, 
         BNFLINE.TRCURR, L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE

sample_data.DEFINITION_: TEKNİK GÜBRE TARIM PEYZAJ İNŞAAT SANAYİ VE TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ
sample_data.LINEEXP: Giden Hv.-TEKNİK GÜBRE TARIM PEYZAJ İNŞAAT SANAYİ VE TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ

sample_data.DEFINITION_: ÖMER ARAS  [ Mert Cam Ayna Tasarım ]
sample_data.LINEEXP: Giden Hv.-ÖMER ARAS  [ Mert Cam Ayna Tasarım ]

sample_data.DEFINITION_: DSM BİLİŞİM TEKNOLOJİLERİ TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ
sample_data.LINEEXP: Giden Hv.-DSM BİLİŞİM TEKNOLOJİLERİ TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ

sample_data.DEFINITION_: AÇSA OTOMOTİV BİLGİSAYAR VE TEKSTİL SANAYİ VE TİC. LTD. ŞTİ.
sample_data.LINEEXP: Giden Hv.-AÇSA OTOMOTİV BİLGİSAYAR VE TEKSTİL SANAYİ VE TİC. LTD. ŞTİ.

sample_data.DEFINITION_: RETECH İÇ VE DIŞ TİCARET ANONİM ŞİRKETİ
